subject: fix(debug): make debug pill panel responsive to screen width
body:
Panel had a fixed 360px width that overflowed on narrow viewports.
Now uses calc(100vw-2rem) with a 360px max, and inner content uses
min-w-0/truncate instead of fixed max-widths so values shrink
gracefully while labels stay readable.

Tags: debug, mobile, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
